nasb.text: Indeed, forty years You provided for them in the wilderness and they were not in want; Their clothes did not wear out, nor did their feet swell.

esv.text: Forty years you sustained them in the wilderness, and they lacked nothing. Their clothes did not wear out and their feet did not swell.

cnv.text: 在曠野四十年，你供養他們，他們毫無缺乏， 衣服沒有穿破，他們的腳也沒有腫痛。

ccb.text: 在旷野的四十年间，你供养他们，使他们一无所缺，他们的衣服没有穿破，脚也没有走肿。
